goal: Remove the ~90px dead empty band at the top of /cards/* card-meaning pages and the /quiz page on mobile, and stop the card-page footer nav pills wrapping to 2 rows (founder screenshots IMG_5121/5122/5123)
root_cause: Two issues. (1) Dead top space: .page-card-meaning (styles.css) and .quiz-page (quiz.css) set padding-top: calc(var(--nav-height) + ~14-18px) to clear a FIXED header — but on these static SEO pages the header (#site-header) is display:none on mobile, so that ~70-90px is empty space above the breadcrumb/cards (same class of bug the founder already fixed for .shop-shell on 2026-06-24). (2) Footer nav wrap: .footer-card-nav and .reading-cta-buttons used grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px,1fr)); the meaning page body is only ~358px wide so only 2 columns fit -> each 3-pill row ([← Homepage][Card Index][The Hierophant →] and [Daily][Celtic Cross][Ask a Question]) wrapped to 2 lines.
fix: (1) Added mobile @media(max-width:768px) overrides tightening padding-top to 14px on body[data-page='meanings'] .page-card-meaning and body[data-page='quiz'] .quiz-page. (2) Changed both pill rows to grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr) so they are always 3-across, plus a @media(max-width:430px) rule shrinking the meanings footer pills (font 11.5px, padding 11px 6px, gap 7px) so long labels fit one row. No JS, no markup, no asset-resolver changes; desktop padding (the min-width:768px/1024px rules) untouched.
verified: Live www.meowtarot.com via headless DOM injection of the new rules: card-meaning breadcrumb top 96px->20px; quiz .quiz-page padding-top 86px->14px; footer .footer-card-nav and .reading-cta-buttons both collapse from 2 rows to 1 row (measured + screenshotted, long labels wrap inside their own pill, rows intact).
